senses.gloss: of or pertaining to the Abqar valley

examples.text: مُتَّكِئِينَ عَلَى رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِيٍّ حِسَانٍ
examples.english: Reclining on green cushions and fair carpets

etymology.text: From عَبْقَر (ʕabqar), name of a valley in Najd that was believed by Bedouins to be home to jinn poets.
